💌 A Letter For You


Some people come into life quietly... but change everything beautifully. Athu mari tha neyum enaku... En life first and best female friend nee tha like a GEM... Unna Mari oru friend kidaikurathu laa Romba Rare uh... Epouvm Happy ah iru.. You are truly special to me 💖

konjo naala unkitta onnu sollanum nu irunthen... College ku vanthathuku apro namakela eppadi da friend kedaipanga nu niraya Think pannuven Aana athela nee friend ah en life kulla vanthathuku apro complete ah change Agidichu.. But First year la nammakulla iruntha bond ipo iruka nuu Konjam doubt ah iruku.. Ethanala nu teriyalal but Ethavathu terinjo teriyamalo thappu panniruntha sorry.. Upcoming Days laa Avathu Palaya mari irukalam nu aasapadra..

📖 Our Story

From strangers to best Friends. Life la evlo per meet pannalum You will be my best friend forever ...

✨ Six Beautiful Memories With You

01

First Memory 💕

The beginning of something truly beautiful 🌸

Happy Day 🌸

Forever Memory ✨

Always in my heart, always 💝

Always & Forever

Aarthi, days will come and go, years will pass by... but the bond we share, the laughter, the little moments — will always stay close to my heart. 🌸

On your special day, I just want you to know — you are one of the most beautiful souls I have ever met. Never stop shining. 🌟

Wishing you all the happiness, all the love, and every dream come true.
